/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/midi_monitor.dir/src/midi_monitor/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midi_monitor.dir/src/midi_monitor/MidiMonitor.cpp.o -o midi_monitor   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/rtmidi/6.0.0/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/rtmidi/6.0.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/tgui/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/sfml/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/tgui/lib/libtgui.1.13.0.dylib -lrtmidi /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sfml/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
